title: Histories of Photography: Personhood and Politics in Colonial India
further_info: Recommended Reading -Sean Willcock, Victorian Visions of War and Peace, Yale University Press, 2023. -Christopher Pinney, The Coming of Photography to India, London, 2008. -Christopher Pinney, Camera Indica: The Social Life of Indian Photographs, 1997. -Annamaria Motrescu-Mayes and Marcus Banks (ed), Visual Histories of South Asia, Primus Books 2018. -Nathianiel Gaskell and Diva Gujral, Photography in India: A Visual History from the 1850s to the Present, London, 2019. -Martin Jay and Sumathi Ramaswamy (eds) Empires of Vision: A Reader, Duke University Press, 2014.
